text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The owner of the vegetable stand asks Haru
Urara to be a team leader in the shopping
district's tug-of-war tournament.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm so excited! Look at me, I'm the team leader!
Yippee! Hooray!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like all the teams are headed by an
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone! Let's focus on our teamwork and
go for broke!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna be soarin' out on the burning wings
of fiery victory!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow, everyone's all fired up! We can't let our
guards down!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: Urara! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The voice belongs to one woman in a huge group
of waving fans. Together they hold up a big
banner that has "Urara's Cheerleaders" written on
it.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Look over there, Trainer! It says "Urara's
Cheerleaders"! How cool!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Thank youuu! There's no way I'm gonna lose now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fan group erupts into cheers in response to
her words—and not long after, the tug-of-war
tournament officially begins.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's team isn't doing as well as I
expected...

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: B-but she can still come back from that! I think...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara's team loses match after match...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Awww, man! I thought we were gonna win that
one for sure!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What should we do, Trainer?
choice_data_list: You need to raise your team's spirits!
Tell them we'll go out for carrot cake if you win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'm their leader, after all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay... Ahem! Listen up, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I know we're all mega frustrated after losing all
those matches, and I get it, I really, really do!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But we can't just give up! We're still super-duper
strong!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Last match was really, really close! If we just work
as a team, we'll be sure to win next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Roused by her words of encouragement, the
supporters in the shopping district start to clap
and cheer.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Team Urara, let's go! Hoo-rah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the team's spirits lifted, the next match ends
in a stunning victory!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Carrot cake? Really?! Hooray!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyone! I heard we're getting carrot cake
if we win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So we gotta give it our all! Let's all pull on "carrot
cake!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's team breaks into smiles at her
excitement over the prospect of carrot cake.

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Now! CARROT!

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text: CAKE!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: CARROOOT!

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text: CAAAKE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Using their "carrot cake" strategy, the match ends
in a splendid victory!
